pages.title: Product Overview
pages.description: What the site is and which public pages matter.
pages.text:
# AI Room Design - Interior Visualization with AI

AI Room Design helps users redesign rooms and visualize new interior layouts with AI-generated previews.

## Site basics
- Site ID: ai-room-design
- Website: https://airoom-design.com
- Default locale: en
- Locales: en

## Public feature scope
- image gen

## Official website
https://airoom-design.com
